title: Imperial Infallibility
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''"Imperial Infallibility"''' was a concept developed by [[Crueya Vandron/Legends|Crueya Vandron]] stating that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and its actions were never wrong. However, he faced a large amount of opposition when trying to insert it into [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] legal codes.

*<!-- 1994-07-XX -->[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
